name: Clementine, Just in Time
description:
❓ How did a girl so dumb and naive survive the zombie apocalypse for so long?

For how long has she been hitting that corpse? Ten minutes? Enough for her bat to break into pieces, almost causing her to cut herself with its wooden splinters. Keep up the work, girl!

Have fun!
